query.description: Full-text search across: name, guard_name, search_blob
Exact match, comma-separated for IN, !value for NOT, null/!null
Enum value. Supports: value, !value, value1,value2 for IN
Comma-separated fields. Prefix with - for DESC. Available: name
Comma-separated relationships to include. Available: permissions

request.description: List Roles using canonical query DSL.¥n¥n**Auth:** requires authenticated tenant session/token (`auth:tenant-api`).¥n¥n**Query params (strict):**¥n- `filter[id]`, `filter[guard_name]`, `filter[search]`¥n- `sort`¥n- `include` (`permissions`)¥n- `page[number]`, `page[size]`¥n¥n**Legacy params prohibited:** `q`, `filters`, `per_page`¥n¥n**Sortable fields:**¥n- `name`¥n¥n**Sort syntax:** comma-separated fields; prefix `-` for descending or use `field:asc|desc`¥n¥n**Filter value operator syntax:**¥n- `value`, `!value`, `>value`, `>=value`, `<value`, `<=value`¥n- `a,b`, `!a,b`, `from..to`, `null`, `!null`¥n¥n**Example:**¥n- `?filter[search]=abc&sort=-created_at&page[number]=1&page[size]=25`
